Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO WAYS AND MEANS

Title: Updates provisions relating to the independent redistricting commission
Summary: Updates provisions relating to the independent redistricting commission; provides for redistricting following every federal census.
ActClause: Concurrent Resolution of the Senate and Assembly proposing an amendment to sections 4 and 5-b of article 3 of the constitution, in relation to the independent redistricting commission
